scope: MCP params exposure (pgmnemo.get_params tool) and smoke-test validation. No schema changes — pure MCP server addition.
justification: No changes to SQL schema, RRF/BM25/HNSW scoring, recall_hybrid, or agent_lesson table. Only addition: pgmnemo.get_params MCP tool that reads ENV vars and returns server config with masked password. All 7 smoke tests pass (test_mcp_smoke.py). All 17 unit tests pass (test_server.py). Zero scoring/ranking impact.
schema_change_detail: None — extension/pgmnemo--0.9.6--0.9.7.sql is a no-op delta. Only default_version bumped to 0.9.7 in pgmnemo.control.
verification: pytest tests/test_mcp_smoke.py: 7/7 passed. pytest pgmnemo_mcp/tests/test_server.py: 17/17 passed. MCP tool get_params returns masked DATABASE_URL, embedding config, version='0.9.7'.
